sourceContext.lead: Translated and adapted from Kamigame's Rosaria guide.
sourceContext.citationText: Source page: Rosaria Guide - Star Savior | Kamigame.

hero.title: Rosaria
hero.subhead: Chaos Ranger | Counter:Side collaboration | explosive crit-based opener
hero.summary: Rosaria is a fast Chaos Ranger burst DPS who turns crits on her ultimate into Inferno stacks, then cashes those stacks into a lethal special.

combatIdentity.title: Combat Identity
combatIdentity.summary: Fast burst Ranger that turns crits into a lethal special while also giving the team AoE Defense Down.
bullets: Ultimate applies Defense Down to all enemies and gives Rosaria +50% action gauge.
Crit Rate is both her damage stat and her Inferno stack engine.
Inferno x3 converts the special into a finisher with a follow-up basic.
Her one-time 40% HP floor lets her survive burst and convert that hit into Attack Up.

skillRotation.title: Skill Rotation
skillRotation.summary: Her entire kit is designed around a fast opener into a stacked special.

steps.title: Open with the ultimate
steps.detail: AoE hit, Defense Down on all enemies, and +50% action gauge.

steps.title: Crit to build Inferno
steps.detail: Each crit target can add a stack, up to Inferno x3.

steps.title: Spend it on the special
steps.detail: Inferno raises special damage and x3 adds a follow-up basic.

steps.title: Snowball the fight
steps.detail: As Upheaval builds, basics keep feeding later burst cycles.

buildPlanner.title: Build Planner
buildPlanner.summary: Use the safer crit-stable baseline first, then pivot into raw damage once Rosaria is already landing Inferno x3 reliably.

sets.label: Primary sets
sets.note: Best first stop when Crit Rate still needs help.

sets.label: Burst swap
sets.note: Once Crit Rate is already solved, this gives better special damage payoff.

priorities: Substats: Crit Rate, Speed, ATK%, Crit DMG, Effect Hit

teamDrafts.title: Team Drafts
teamDrafts.summary: Rosaria fits comfortably into safer PvE teams because her opener improves the entire team's damage.
teamDrafts.label: Recommended team
teamDrafts.team: Rosaria / Waltz Asherah / Emily / Bunny Charlotte
teamDrafts.note: Waltz Asherah and Emily help Rosaria convert her opener into a stable burst window while Bunny Charlotte rounds out the team.

targetStats.summary: Destruction Set / CRIT DMG Rosaria target tuned to maximize Crit Rate while keeping strong opener speed and useful Effect Hit.

upgradePath.title: Priority
items: Breakthrough urgency is low because Rosaria is already strong at base copy.
Travel Hard: EX if Crit Rate is missing, FX if Crit Rate is already solved.

journeyHard.title: Recommended Cards
journeyHard.summary: Core line: Rosaria, Lacy, and Charlotte. Fill the flex slots with Bunny Frey or Bunny Claire, then Petra or Naru.

items.label: Passive
items.title: Tyrant of the North
items.summary: More Inferno generation after basics as Upheaval climbs, plus a one-time 40% HP floor that grants Attack Up.

items.label: Basic
items.title: Ashen Flame
items.summary: Single-target elemental hit that grants 1 stack of Upheaval.

items.label: Special
items.title: King's Judgment
items.summary: Consumes Inferno for burst damage. Inferno x3 adds an extra Ashen Flame follow-up.

items.label: Ultimate
items.title: Gap in Power
items.summary: AoE Defense Down, +50% action gauge, Lord of the Throne, and up to 3 Inferno based on crit targets.
